Interface BotLiveServiceGrpc.AsyncService

All Known Implementing Classes:
BotLiveServiceGrpc.BotLiveServiceImplBase, BotLiveServiceImpl
Enclosing class:
BotLiveServiceGrpc
public static interface BotLiveServiceGrpc.AsyncService
Live bot automation service. See file header for scope and design notes.
Permissions:
- READ_BOT_INFO: required for WatchBotEvents, GetBlock, FindBlocks,
                 ListNearbyEntities.
- UPDATE_BOT_CONFIG: required for SendChat, DigBlock, PlaceBlock, UseItem,
                     AttackEntity, InteractEntity, SwingArm, GoTo,
                     StopPathfinding.
Error handling mirrors BotService:
- NOT_FOUND: instance or bot does not exist.
- FAILED_PRECONDITION: bot is not online, target not loaded, or the
                       requested action is not currently valid.
- OUT_OF_RANGE: target is outside the bot's reach / observation radius.
- INTERNAL: unexpected server errors.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default void
    attackEntity(AttackEntityRequest request, io.grpc.stub.StreamObserver<AttackEntityResponse> responseObserver)
    Attacks a specific entity by network id.
    default void
    digBlock(DigBlockRequest request, io.grpc.stub.StreamObserver<DigBlockResponse> responseObserver)
    Starts (or stops, when `cancel` is set) breaking a block at a specific position.
    default void
    findBlocks(FindBlocksRequest request, io.grpc.stub.StreamObserver<FindBlocksResponse> responseObserver)
    Finds blocks of the given ids within a radius of the bot.
    default void
    getBlock(GetBlockRequest request, io.grpc.stub.StreamObserver<GetBlockResponse> responseObserver)
    Returns the block at a world position, if the chunk is loaded.
    default void
    goTo(GoToRequest request, io.grpc.stub.StreamObserver<PathfindProgress> responseObserver)
    Requests the bot to pathfind to a goal.
    default void
    interactEntity(InteractEntityRequest request, io.grpc.stub.StreamObserver<InteractEntityResponse> responseObserver)
    Right-clicks / interacts with a specific entity by network id.
    default void
    listNearbyEntities(ListNearbyEntitiesRequest request, io.grpc.stub.StreamObserver<ListNearbyEntitiesResponse> responseObserver)
    Lists entities within a radius of the bot, optionally filtered by type.
    default void
    placeBlock(PlaceBlockRequest request, io.grpc.stub.StreamObserver<PlaceBlockResponse> responseObserver)
    Places the currently held item as a block, against a specific face of a specific block.
    default void
    sendChat(SendChatRequest request, io.grpc.stub.StreamObserver<SendChatResponse> responseObserver)
    Sends a chat message (or slash command) from the bot to the connected Minecraft server.
    default void
    stopPathfinding(StopPathfindingRequest request, io.grpc.stub.StreamObserver<StopPathfindingResponse> responseObserver)
    Cancels any in-progress pathfinding session for this bot.
    default void
    swingArm(SwingArmRequest request, io.grpc.stub.StreamObserver<SwingArmResponse> responseObserver)
    Swings the specified arm without a target (visual animation only).
    default void
    useItem(UseItemRequest request, io.grpc.stub.StreamObserver<UseItemResponse> responseObserver)
    Uses the item in the specified hand (eat, drink, throw, draw bow, etc.).
    default void
    watchBotEvents(WatchBotEventsRequest request, io.grpc.stub.StreamObserver<BotEvent> responseObserver)
    Subscribes to a single multiplexed event stream for one bot.

  • Method Details

    • watchBotEvents

      default void watchBotEvents(WatchBotEventsRequest request, io.grpc.stub.StreamObserver<BotEvent> responseObserver)
      Subscribes to a single multiplexed event stream for one bot. The first
message is always a snapshot; subsequent messages are deltas and events
according to the filter. The server may emit additional snapshots if the
session reconnects or the client falls behind.

    • sendChat

      default void sendChat(SendChatRequest request, io.grpc.stub.StreamObserver<SendChatResponse> responseObserver)
      Sends a chat message (or slash command) from the bot to the connected
Minecraft server. Messages prefixed with "/" are routed as commands.

    • getBlock

      default void getBlock(GetBlockRequest request, io.grpc.stub.StreamObserver<GetBlockResponse> responseObserver)
      Returns the block at a world position, if the chunk is loaded.

    • findBlocks

      default void findBlocks(FindBlocksRequest request, io.grpc.stub.StreamObserver<FindBlocksResponse> responseObserver)
      Finds blocks of the given ids within a radius of the bot. Results are
sorted by ascending distance.

    • listNearbyEntities

      default void listNearbyEntities(ListNearbyEntitiesRequest request, io.grpc.stub.StreamObserver<ListNearbyEntitiesResponse> responseObserver)
      Lists entities within a radius of the bot, optionally filtered by type.

    • digBlock

      default void digBlock(DigBlockRequest request, io.grpc.stub.StreamObserver<DigBlockResponse> responseObserver)
      Starts (or stops, when `cancel` is set) breaking a block at a specific
position. Unlike MouseClick, the target is explicit — no raytrace from
the current look direction is performed.

    • placeBlock

      default void placeBlock(PlaceBlockRequest request, io.grpc.stub.StreamObserver<PlaceBlockResponse> responseObserver)
      Places the currently held item as a block, against a specific face of a
specific block.

    • useItem

      default void useItem(UseItemRequest request, io.grpc.stub.StreamObserver<UseItemResponse> responseObserver)
      Uses the item in the specified hand (eat, drink, throw, draw bow, etc.).

    • attackEntity

      default void attackEntity(AttackEntityRequest request, io.grpc.stub.StreamObserver<AttackEntityResponse> responseObserver)
      Attacks a specific entity by network id.

    • interactEntity

      default void interactEntity(InteractEntityRequest request, io.grpc.stub.StreamObserver<InteractEntityResponse> responseObserver)
      Right-clicks / interacts with a specific entity by network id. Used for
trading with villagers, mounting mobs, etc.

    • swingArm

      default void swingArm(SwingArmRequest request, io.grpc.stub.StreamObserver<SwingArmResponse> responseObserver)
      Swings the specified arm without a target (visual animation only).

    • goTo

      default void goTo(GoToRequest request, io.grpc.stub.StreamObserver<PathfindProgress> responseObserver)
      Requests the bot to pathfind to a goal. Returns a stream of progress
events terminating with COMPLETED, FAILED, or CANCELLED. A new GoTo for
the same bot supersedes any in-progress pathfinding; the previous stream
is closed with CANCELLED.

    • stopPathfinding

      default void stopPathfinding(StopPathfindingRequest request, io.grpc.stub.StreamObserver<StopPathfindingResponse> responseObserver)
      Cancels any in-progress pathfinding session for this bot.
